chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3581 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For order on MA No.19005/2025 (Urgent). 2. For order on MA No.19006/2025 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of case. 26.12.2025 Mr. Arslan Naeem, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant. -------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this Criminal Bail Application the applicant Ibad Siddiqui S/o Muhammad Jawed seeks protective bail in Crime No.114/2025 for the offence under section 420, 406, 148, 149, 506/2, PPC registered at Police Station Cantt, Sukkur. Counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant has been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicant apprehends his arrest by the hands of the police, which humiliate him, therefore, he may be granted protective bail enabling him to surrender before the trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above-named is admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.25,000/- with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling him to surrender before the trial Court for a period of twelve days. In case the applicant does not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant Crl. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly.
Instant Crl. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
